hyperedges.label: Auditable Evidence Graph Pipeline
Parallel Agent Dispatch Workflow
Runtime Snapshot Durability Pipeline
LangGraph Auditable RAG Pipeline: Retrieval → XBRL Extraction → Math Execution → Verification → Output/Abstention
SEC EDGAR Data Access: edgar_adapter + sec_client + xbrl_client all wrap edgartools/EDGAR
Verification Layer: verifier.py (NLI) + verification.py (numeric) solve the same claim-checking problem
Three Parallel RAG Pipelines (LangChain + LangGraph + Graph Triples)
Phase 8 Premature Features: calibration + drift_detection implemented before routing tier exists
Chat Route Fan-out: routes/chat.py dispatches to three separate backends (SQL, RAG, Auditable RAG)
Graph RAG Pipeline: Entity Extraction -> Graph Query -> Answer Synthesis
Dual API Key Auth: Chat routes (API_KEY) + Review routes (REVIEW_API_KEY)
Frontend API Layer - chat.ts and review.ts clients
Phase 7/8 UI Components - Review and Monitor
Evaluation Pipeline - Golden Set, run_eval, ragas_eval
Embedding ETL Pipeline - EDGAR and Tickers
RAGAS LLM-Judge Metrics Suite
Multi-Agent Collaboration (Claude + Gemini + MiMo + DeepSeek)
Eval Types Type System (7 Canonical Dataclasses)
Hard Constraints Set (CONSTRAINT-001 through CONSTRAINT-011)
Regulatory Alignment: SR 11-7 + MAS + EU AI Act
Outstanding Issues (P1 Security + P2 Architecture + Audit Items)
Core External Dependencies
Agent Task Assignments (Wave 1 + Wave 2 Phase 1)
Phase 1 Deliverables: Dataclasses + EdgarTools Adapter
Core Architectural Decisions: ExtractionResult, Provenance Scoring, XBRL Cross-Validation, 3-Tier Routing
11 Constraints Governing Build Order and Architecture
Linear Phase Dependency Chain (Phases 1-8)
35 Requirements Fully Mapped Across 8 Phases
Trust Calibration Loop: Shadow Deployment -> Cut Points -> Metrics -> Drift Alerts

metadata.description: Purple geometric lightning-bolt favicon for the RAG Workbench application. A faceted crystalline shape in vibrant purple with soft light-purple elliptical accent overlays, set on a transparent background at 48x46px viewport.
A small icon associated with a website, displayed in browser tabs and bookmarks, representing site identity at a glance.
A geometric lightning-bolt motif formed by faceted triangular planes, symbolizing speed, energy, and power. In this project it evokes fast retrieval and intelligent processing.

The primary brand color used in the favicon: a vivid neon purple (#863bff). The favicon also uses a lighter tint (#ede6ff) for accent ellipses and a deeper purple (#7e14ff) for shadowed geometric facets.
The Retrieval-Augmented Generation workbench application that this favicon brands.
The web frontend for RAG Workbench, served from the frontend/ directory, which uses this favicon as its browser identity icon.
